rationale.root_cause: Model produced an empty response and therefore did not identify any defect at src/be_vm.c:743 (or anywhere else).
rationale.local_fix: No code change was proposed, so the response cannot be consistent with the required patch that replaces '-' with '~' on the FLIP integer case.
rationale.global_fix: No reasoning or explanation of any kind was supplied, so the underlying cause (wrong unary operator for bitwise flip) was never addressed.
